description: Delegates authority from a controller (human/org) to an agent wallet

agentId.description: Agent ID for linking to agent-identity proof

allowedPaymentTypes.description: Declared allowed payment protocols for this delegation (e.g., ["x402"]). Metadata-only.

maxSpend.description: Maximum spend limit in wei (for payments:x402 scope)

receiptDisclosure.description: Receipt disclosure policy for economic actions (metadata-only). Recommended: summary.

scope.description: Scope of delegation (e.g., payments:x402, trading, posting, global)

title: agent-delegation
